overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter-style wizarding game showing a character in robes exploring a castle common room. The camera slowly pans right across stone walls adorned with house banners, portraits, and gothic furnishings, revealing a large wooden door at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle common room with house banners and desk area

agents.ego_description: standing at the wooden desk examining portraits and objects, then moving left and exiting the frame as the camera pans right

entered.detail: red and gold checkered house banner hanging on stone wall
green and silver house banner hanging between Gryffindor and Ravenclaw
blue and bronze house banner on the right side of the wall
dark wooden desk with portraits and candles arranged on top
three framed magical portraits hanging above the desk
wooden board with papers pinned to the left of the desk
wall-mounted shelf holding various objects and rolled parchments
lit candles on the desk providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a gothic castle common room with stone walls and hanging house banners. The player character in wizard robes stands at a wooden desk adorned with magical portraits and candles. The camera slowly pans right, revealing the Gryffindor, Slytherin, and Ravenclaw banners while the character gradually moves left and exits the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with arched wooden door

events.description: focus shifts from the desk area to the large gothic door at the end of the room

agents.ego_description: character has exited the frame to the left while the camera continues panning right toward the door

entered.detail: yellow and black house banner hanging on the right side of the wall
brown leather armchair positioned against the wall
two framed portraits hanging on the wall near the door
large arched wooden door with metal studs and stone frame
gothic stone arch surrounding the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right across the common room, revealing the Hufflepuff banner and a leather armchair. The focus shifts to a large gothic wooden door with an ornate stone archway. The Ravenclaw banner and shelf move from the right to the left of the frame as the pan concludes centered on the detailed wooden door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a gothic castle common room that shifts from a detailed study area to a focused view of a grand exit. It begins beside a wooden desk adorned with magical portraits and candles, where a character in wizard robes stands before moving out of the frame. As the camera glides to the right, it passes a series of hanging house banners for Gryffindor, Slytherin, and Ravenclaw against the stone walls. The movement continues past a Hufflepuff banner and a leather armchair, causing the surrounding gothic furnishings to slide across the field of vision. The scene finally centers on a large, ornate wooden door framed by a detailed stone archway as the pan concludes.
